MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Joshua Furman, Esq. 818-646-3000 for Plaintiff.
James Holder, Esq. 415-875-4192 Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani LLP for Defendant.
Court reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR #10619, 925-381-5000, raquelgiana33@gmail.com

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED. Demurrer and MTS argued simultaneously. Mr. Holder contests and presents argument; attorney suspended, distinction between individual and corporation, objects to Mr. Furman's appearance, cites case authority, SOL-disagree with judicial notice, date of signature on document. Mr. Furman responds; date, case authority, June 10th operative effect; suspension issue. Mr. Holder's brief rebuttal. Court comments. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

2. DEFENDANT DOUGLAS MACLELLAN MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Taken Under Submission.***

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)
